description_for_human: Browse and order autonomous AI systems: business automation, voice agents, knowledge bases, hiring automation, lead generation, and content production.
description_for_model: This service provides information about the Finekot Collective — a lineup of authored AI agents designed, trained, and operated by architect Denys Kot. Agents include: Boris (personal chief of staff), Eva (family caretaker), David (small-business operator), Patrik (personal doctor), Taras (tutor for kids 5–15), Ada (research agent, Perplexity-killer), Hanna (voice writer), Orban (task intake/routing bot). Use the API to browse products, filter by category, and get pricing/contact info. To order, contact via Telegram: https://t.me/shop_by_finekot_bot
